revisedPrompt:
Create a polished production-ready wide hero/intro illustration for the EX-0007 visual redesign, using the three supplied images as references with strict role separation:

REFERENCE USE:
- Use the supplied magenta sprite sheet ONLY for the exact original identities, clothing, colors, accessories, and silhouettes of the two human characters and the handmade glider. Completely ignore/remove the magenta background. Preserve the young ground courier exactly: orange tousled hair, teal short-sleeve tunic/shirt with small yellow leaf emblem, long teal scarf trailing behind, coral-orange patched shorts, fingerless coral gloves, olive-green crossbody courier satchel with rolled papers, cream scrunched socks/leg wraps, olive boots. Preserve the human flying rival exactly: teal hair, brass goggles on forehead, coral-red top, pale teal trousers, green scarf, brown gloves and shoes, olive satchel, piloting the same whimsical handmade wood-and-cloth glider with pale mint wings, wooden spars, handlebars, exposed frame, and rear propeller.
- Use the supplied meadow panorama only for environmental continuity: bright morning blue sky, soft rolling green hills, broad trailhead meadow, tiny distant shelter/signpost feeling, sparse flowers and grasses.
- Take ONLY broad stylistic inspiration from the first art reference: clean hand-drawn dark contours, flat pastel fills, subtle paper-like texture, playful organic imperfections, charming whimsical original storybook atmosphere. Do not copy any characters, creatures, props, architecture, layout, or composition from that reference.

COMPOSITION:
A wide 16:9 side-profile morning scene designed as a website hero. Keep the LEFT 40% calm, open, and low-detail for live HTML title and controls: mostly clear pale-blue sky with a gentle gradient, distant soft hills, and simple meadow; no focal objects, no busy flowers, and absolutely no text or interface elements.

Place the main storytelling action on the RIGHT half, while keeping both important figures safely inset from all edges so they survive desktop and mobile crops. In the lower-right/mid-right foreground, the young courier stands in clear side profile facing toward the route ahead, poised and ready to run, alert and determined, beside a clearly broken elevated earth path. The path should read unmistakably as a raised grassy earthen causeway with a large collapsed gap: torn turf edges, exposed soil layers, roots, a few loose stones, and the continuation visible on the far side. Keep the break dramatic but friendly and non-dangerous in tone.

Above and slightly ahead of the courier in the upper-right quadrant, the human rival launches overhead in the handmade glider, side profile traveling toward the route, wings catching the morning air, scarf and small fabric details streaming backward. Show the glider fully and legibly without cropping its wing tips or propeller. The rival is energetic and competitive, not threatening.

Beyond the broken path, let the distant trailhead meadow and winding route subtly suggest the journey ahead, with rolling hills and a tiny shelter/signpost shape far in the distance, integrated naturally and without readable markings. Use warm low morning light from the left, soft long shadows, fresh pastel greens, sky blues, muted coral and teal accents, and enough atmospheric depth to separate foreground path, middle meadow, and distant hills.

VISUAL REQUIREMENTS:
- Original composition and original world.
- Exact character identity and costume continuity from the sprite sheet.
- Side-on readability, clean silhouettes, strong crop safety.
- No baked text, letters, numbers, UI, title, logo, watermark, branding, signage text, frame, border, copied characters, or copied composition.
- Do not include any extra people, fantasy creatures, birds, railway tracks, station platforms, swords, armor, or hooded figures from the style reference.
- High-quality finished editorial/game-intro illustration, clean linework and flat pastel storybook color, landscape 16:9.
